disclosure_items.clinical_fact: The alarming reading was a single measurement taken on a self-service pharmacy machine while the patient was extremely anxious
trigger_question_examples: Where and how was the blood pressure measured?
What were you doing when you got that reading?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: It was one of those stand-up machines at the pharmacy. I put my arm in and it flashed up 180 over 100 and I just froze.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Completely asymptomatic — denies headache, chest pain, breathlessness, and visual disturbance
trigger_question_examples: Do you have any headache, chest pain or trouble breathing right now?
Any change in your vision or feeling unwell in your body?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No, nothing like that. I honestly feel physically fine — no headache, no chest pain, my breathing is normal and my eyes are fine. It's just the fear.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Denies stroke-type symptoms — no one-sided weakness, no facial droop, no slurred speech, no sudden severe headache
trigger_question_examples: Any weakness or numbness on one side, drooping of the face, or trouble speaking?
Did you get a sudden, severe headache unlike any before?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No, none of that. My face and arms feel normal, I'm speaking fine, and I don't have a headache at all.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Reports that high readings have occurred before but only ever in clinical settings, never associated with feeling unwell
trigger_question_examples: Has your blood pressure ever been high before?
Do you check it anywhere else, like at home?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: It's been high a couple of times at the doctor's or at machines, but I've never felt sick from it. I don't have a monitor at home.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Longstanding intense nervousness specifically around healthcare professionals and medical equipment
trigger_question_examples: How do you feel about medical settings and having things measured?
Do you tend to get anxious around doctors or machines?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Honestly I get worked up the moment I'm near anything medical. My heart races, I feel panicky. I've always been like this.

trigger_question_examples: Are you on any regular medications, especially for blood pressure?
Do you take anything from the chemist or any supplements regularly?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No, I don't take anything regularly. Nothing for blood pressure.
